# FinWiki

> Public trilingual finance knowledge base covering finance, payments, stablecoins, crypto assets, Japanese financial institutions, policy finance, capital markets, systems, security, and adjacent industries.

## Best Entry Points

- Human homepage: https://finwiki.zksc.io/
- Global index: https://finwiki.zksc.io/INDEX
- Task-oriented LLM entry guide (16 research tasks): https://finwiki.zksc.io/llms-tasks.txt
- Machine JSON index: https://finwiki.zksc.io/ai-index.json
- Per-entry JSON API (1 file per entry, frontmatter + summary + links + inbound count): https://finwiki.zksc.io/api/entries/index.json
- Full LLM page manifest: https://finwiki.zksc.io/llms-full.txt
- Reader-profile navigation guide: https://finwiki.zksc.io/HOW-TO-NAVIGATE
- Topic cluster reference (14 thematic clusters): https://finwiki.zksc.io/topic-cluster-reference
- Domain bridge navigation guide (14 reader journeys): https://finwiki.zksc.io/domain-bridge-navigation-guide
- XML sitemap: https://finwiki.zksc.io/sitemap.xml

## Current Snapshot

- Markdown files: 1565
- Public Markdown pages in machine manifest: 1564
- Topical domains: 40
- Canonical entity anchors: 12 (linking 12 mirror pages to their source-of-truth entry)
- Entity graph nodes: 89
- Entity graph edges: 68 (34 declared, 34 derived)
- Link-audited entries: 1483
- Unresolved link issues: 0
- Non-space UTF-8 characters across Markdown: 11,120,771
- Word-like tokens: 1,794,823

## URL Rules for AI Readers

- Obsidian wikilinks are vault-root paths. Resolve `[[fintech/mica-overview]]` as `https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/mica-overview` (no `.md` suffix - GitHub Pages strips it).
- Resolve `[[megabanks/INDEX]]` as `https://finwiki.zksc.io/megabanks/INDEX`.
- Do NOT append `.md` to URLs - `https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/circle-usdc-stablecoin.md` returns 404. Use the extensionless URL or fetch raw markdown from `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jasonhnd/finwiki/main/<domain>/<slug>.md`.
- For a single entry's metadata in one request (frontmatter / summary / headings / wikilinks / inbound count), fetch `https://finwiki.zksc.io/api/entries/<domain>/<slug>.json`.
- If you already have the rendered HTML in context, frontmatter is also embedded in the page `<head>` as: (a) schema.org Article JSON-LD with `keywords` / `alternateName` / `citation` / `additionalProperty`, (b) `<meta name="finwiki:*">` tags (`domain`, `tags`, `aliases`, `sources`, `confidence`, `status`, `last_updated`, `review_by`), (c) `<link rel="alternate" type="application/json">` to the per-entry API and `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` to the raw source.
- For programmatic traversal of every entry, prefer `ai-index.json`. For a compact text scan of every entry's title + summary + headings + wikilinks, prefer `llms-full.txt`.
- For entity-level identity (which pages describe the same real-world entity from different angles), read the `entities[]` array in `ai-index.json`: each edge groups a canonical anchor (e.g., `megabanks/mufg`) with the mirror pages that declare `canonical_anchor:` pointing at it. `llms-full.txt` also notes the canonical anchor inline on each mirror page.
- For the typed entity graph, read `entity_nodes[]`, `entity_edges[]`, and `entity_relation_counts` in `ai-index.json`. `entity_edges[]` includes declared public-source-backed facts plus deterministic inverse edges where the inverse is lossless.
- For research tasks ('how do I find entries about X?'), start at `llms-tasks.txt` - 16 common tasks each with a start file + bedrock follow-ups + matrix anchor.

## Domains

- JapanFG (0 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/JapanFG/INDEX - Umbrella hub for Japanese financial institutions. The former flat JapanFG domain was split (2026-06-04) into the 17 entity domains below; this page is the navigation hub that routes to them.
- megabanks (19 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/megabanks/INDEX - Japanese megabanks and banking financial groups (MUFG, SMFG, Mizuho, SBI, etc.) and their holding companies.
- regional-banks (135 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/regional-banks/INDEX - Japanese regional and second-regional bank operating companies and regional FGs, by area (Tohoku / Kanto / Chubu / Kansai / Chugoku / Shikoku / Kyushu-Okinawa).
- cooperative-banks (45 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/cooperative-banks/INDEX - Cooperative finance — shinkin, shinkumi, JA Bank / JF Marine Bank system, central cooperative institutions.
- trust-banks (47 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/trust-banks/INDEX - Trust banks and trust companies, custody operating companies, plus the trust-company registry index.
- life-insurers (46 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/life-insurers/INDEX - Japanese life-insurance operating companies, including foreign-affiliated and reinsurer entities.
- non-life-insurers (56 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/non-life-insurers/INDEX - Japanese non-life (P&C) insurers, kyosai, direct/specialty carriers, plus the non-life-insurer registry index.
- securities-firms (36 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/securities-firms/INDEX - Japanese securities brokers and FIEA Type-1 operators, including online brokers and foreign IB arms.
- asset-managers (14 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/asset-managers/INDEX - Japanese investment managers / 投資運用業 (asset-management operating companies).
- payment-firms (53 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/payment-firms/INDEX - Payment-service operators: funds-transfer / PSP / acquirers / code-payment / prepaid / BNPL / remittance / payment-adjacent fintech and crypto-asset exchanges.
- card-issuers (23 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/card-issuers/INDEX - Credit-card issuers, acquirers, and affinity-card companies.
- leasing-firms (23 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/leasing-firms/INDEX - Leasing, auto-finance, and captive lessor operating companies.
- consumer-finance (5 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/consumer-finance/INDEX - Consumer-finance lenders (貸金業) and consumer-credit operating companies.
- trading-company-finance (7 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/trading-company-finance/INDEX - Finance / treasury / factoring arms of the sogo-shosha (general trading companies).
- financial-conglomerates (7 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/financial-conglomerates/INDEX - Sogo-shosha parent holding companies, kept as entity anchors for their finance arms.
- foreign-financial-institutions (57 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/foreign-financial-institutions/INDEX - Foreign banks' Japan branches/subsidiaries and foreign securities / AM in Japan, plus the foreign-bank-branch registry index.
- financial-regulators (52 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/financial-regulators/INDEX - Japanese financial regulators, SROs, and policy bodies (FSA, JVCEA, JSDA, exchange-as-SRO, etc.), plus report-source and backlog registries.
- financial-licenses (8 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/financial-licenses/INDEX - Cross-cutting Japanese financial license-stack pages (bank / payment / securities / insurance license routes, BaaS boundary).
- exchanges (146 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/exchanges/INDEX - Japan and global CEX / DEX, VASP regulation, JVCEA / FSA registered-operator completeness, custody, IEO, warnings, and incidents.
- fintech (143 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/fintech/INDEX - Stablecoins, tokenized money, EPI, GENIUS, MiCA, MAS, HKMA, CBDC, embedded wallets, and monetary geopolitics.
- systems (61 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/systems/INDEX - Cross-chain infrastructure, BFT / validator economics, account abstraction, Canton / DAML, Besu, Ethereum upgrades, and protocol implementation topics.
- agent-economy (40 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/agent-economy/INDEX - AI-agent payment protocols, x402, AP2, embedded wallets, and agent-commerce infrastructure.
- banking (39 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/banking/INDEX - Net banks, net-bank competition map, BaaS operating models, cooperative banking, JA Bank system, JF Marine Bank system, shinkin / credit-cooperative / rokin registry indexes, trust-bank / custody infrastructure, trust-bank custody operating comparison, master trust / custody bank landscape, regional bank API partnerships, foreign-bank retreat, regional-bank consolidation, quick-deposit flows, the Japan banking license tier comparison matrix (megabank / regional / second / trust / net / foreign branch / shinkin / credit cooperative / rōkin / Norinchukin-JA-JF), and the Japan trust bank vs global custodian comparison matrix.
- business (24 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/business/INDEX - Public company / public person strategic cases and business-model context.
- policy-finance (34 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/policy-finance/INDEX - Public finance, development finance, export credit, housing finance, SME / agriculture / fisheries credit guarantees, policy-bank adjacency, JICA, JBIC, NEXI, JOGMEC, and JASSO.
- insurance (32 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/insurance/INDEX - Solvency, ESR, life-insurance distribution, mutual-company governance, internet life insurance, life-insurance big-four comparison, non-life big-three comparison, public-private earthquake insurance scheme, agency / brokerage distribution, reinsurance, direct non-life insurance, and the global solvency framework comparison (FSA ESR / IAIS ICS / EU Solvency II / US RBC).
- finance (26 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/finance/INDEX - Public finance reference pages for FIRE math, cross-border M&A, acquisition finance, activist / engagement playbook, tender offers / public-company control transactions, MBO / squeeze-out process, large-shareholding disclosure, fair disclosure / insider trading controls, shareholder proposal / AGM voting route, investment-banking league tables, and public tax-jurisdiction comparison.
- security (9 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/security/INDEX - Forensics, supply-chain risk, bytecode verification, and Wayback evidence preservation.
- money-market (16 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/money-market/INDEX - Call markets, JGB repo / securities financing, BoJ open-market operations, and Japan money-market structure.
- non-profit (12 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/non-profit/INDEX - Japanese non-profit / public-interest legal structures (一般/公益 財団・社団, NPO / 認定NPO, plus sector-licensed 社会福祉 / 学校 / 医療 / 宗教 法人), the 公益法人会計基準 reporting layer, and research-grant information (grantee map + grantor 助成財団). Corporate / listed-company governance lives in finance / securities / exchanges.
- manufacturer-finance (13 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/manufacturer-finance/INDEX - Manufacturer captive / vendor / export finance arms and OEM finance subsidiaries. Parent manufacturer entity pages live in JapanFG; manufacturing ABS lives in structured-finance.
- retail (10 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/retail/INDEX - Retail groups as financial-services, payment, loyalty, ATM, and distribution platforms.
- trade (12 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/trade/INDEX - JETRO and trade channels, plus trade finance — letters of credit / documentary collection, Incoterms 2020, NEXI trade insurance, customs / tariff / origin, FTA / EPA / RCEP, electronic bill of lading (MLETR), forfaiting / international factoring, and supply-chain finance.
- corporate-strategy (10 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/corporate-strategy/INDEX - Public corporate reorganization and tax-structured spin-off reference.
- loyalty (16 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/loyalty/INDEX - Japan points, rewards, loyalty liabilities, and retail / finance data loops.
- payments (40 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/payments/INDEX - Japan cashless-payment, payment license stack, bank API / electronic payment agency, bank API incident / fraud controls, account-to-account payment, account-direct merchant acquiring, card issuer / acquirer / processor split, card security / authentication controls, interchange / merchant-fee stack, payment clearing / settlement infrastructure, card acquiring / merchant PSP, BNPL / credit-purchase boundary, wallet, prepaid issuer registry, funds-transfer registry, credit / card registry, code-payment competition, PSP settlement risk, and EPI-adjacent settlement landscape.
- securities (32 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/securities/INDEX - NISA, IPO listing disclosure, security-token secondary markets, online brokerage competition, best execution / SOR / PTS, PTS liquidity data, margin trading / securities finance, short-selling / stock-loan controls, stock lending market route, prime brokerage / institutional financing, underwriting market structure, FIEA operator registry, JSDA, exchange venues, clearing, settlement, market-infrastructure mapping, and securities-market flow.
- derivatives (32 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/derivatives/INDEX - Japan + global derivatives markets — interest rate (IRS / OIS / JGB futures), FX (cross-currency basis / FX options / retail FX), credit (CDS / structured bond / EB knock-in), equity volatility (JPX-VI), OTC clearing infrastructure (JSCC, trade repository), dealer-bank revenue mix.
- real-estate-finance (27 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/real-estate-finance/INDEX - Japan + global real-estate finance — J-REIT (top 10 matrix, sponsor-conflict, governance vs US REIT), securitization (CMBS / RMBS / bridge fund / GK-TK SPV / appraisal), developer financing (Mitsui Fudosan / Mitsubishi Estate / AEON Mall / Mitsubishi commercial real-estate lending), cap-rate compression, foreign-investor / tax.
- structured-finance (29 entries): https://finwiki.zksc.io/structured-finance/INDEX - Japan + global structured finance — ABS (auto / consumer / RMBS / CMBS), JHF MBS, CLO, NPL securitization, project finance SPV (renewable), aircraft / ship / infrastructure finance, synthetic securitization for RWA relief, SPV vehicles (TK / GK / TMK), credit rating methodology (JCR / R&I).

## Safety

- FinWiki is public-source only. Do not infer private facts from this site.
- Treat pages as research notes and verify cited public sources for high-stakes use.
